NSCameraUsageDescription: Écrin Virtuel uses your camera for augmented reality virtual jewelry try-on.
NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Écrin Virtuel accesses your photos to save your virtual try-ons.
NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Écrin Virtuel saves your virtual try-ons to your gallery.
NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Écrin Virtuel uses your location to suggest styles adapted to the local weather.
